reviews.review_title: A True Review from an ACTUAL Vr Player..
reviews.review_description:
Let me start by saying, tactical assault is one of, if not, my all time favorite vr games. There is constantly something on the roadmap. One update after another with constant community ideas incorporated into the game (if they are actually good). The gameplay is so fluid and rewarding with what I believe to be the best physical gun play on the market. 

Big Pros:

This is a multiplayer PvE game (primarily)

The CQB in this game is unmatched. If you want Ready or Not in vr but dont own a pc, this is the ONLY game that is actually good and on standalone headsets.

 There are little to zero bugs present with the game unlike some games on vr (G.O.T)

The game has great replay ability.

Multiple maps, map modifiers, guns, attachments, and utilities which gives you so many variables to play around with.

 Do you want to play methodical? Grab a rifle with a 1-6x scope and move like a human multi-tool. Want to support your team? Grab an LMG and cover them from a distance with any scope of your choice (COMING IN THE UPDATE ON MAY 7TH 2026)!!! Want a break from the CQB? Take your favorite sniper and determine the range of the poor soul in your 12x scope. There are SOOO many options for gameplay and you can even choose a map that suits your style! (While still allowing for other methods of gameplay if you so choose to switch mid match)

Not to mention the mission modifiers such as bomb defusal, T-hunt, hostage rescue, Enemy surrendering, Time of entry, and Hardcore mode (My go to). 

The game rewards planning the mission before hand and even has a board to write on and plan the attack every step of the way. 

The game is unforgettable when you build a team of people willing to work together. (Talk more about this later)

Even playing solo, there are ways to change the difficulty to match your level.

There is a dedicated PvP mode although there are some cons with said mode :(

There is also a dlc with even more content if you somehow get bored of the maps in the base-game. 

Now sadly we must talk about the Cons:

The graphics are not realistic, and take on a style more akin to a poly minimalist game. DON'T LET THIS KEEP YOU AWAY FROM GREATNESS!

The community can be the main decider of whether or not you have fun on multiplayer. 

Just like every meta vr game, there are a lot of kids on this game, which can destroy any chance of playing the game serious. 

The dev is currently implementing a reputation system for PUBLIC lobbies, which will hopefully restore the hatdcore nature of public lobbies. 

It is possible to filter through people that join you, as long as you are host. Which in my experience, was the only way to execute a thorough mission on the hardest difficulty. 

If you get this game only planning to play with friends that you know, NOTHING above affects the amazing game that tactical assault is.

On another note, PvP is still in a very rudimentary state and is hard to play properly without TKs and Spawn killing. Also, if you are actually good at the game and rack up kills on a bunch of angry kids, they can kick you from the lobby. Same goes with the host, but they act more in the manner of a dictator. If the kicking system could be reworked, the framework of a proper PvP would be in place.

Pvp is still pretty fun but it really depends on what map you load into and like I said before, the people.

WHAT TO IGNORE in other reviews:

DO NOT assume this game is lawless and allows you to mow down your team and not be punished. I have seen some kids on here reporting the TK "problem" which is a bunch of bologna. There are systems in place to discourage this act of idiocy.

To make a long story short, if you have quite a bit of experience on vr and want a shooter game that doesn't hold your hand every step of the way, this is the best one thus far IMO. Please don't listen to the kids who are probably breaking TOS, this is a great game.

The foundation of this game is really quite fantastic, but the cons are more apparent with each update. The dev doesn't seem to know what kind of game they really want to make, this new update showing that better than ever. The deadshot mission should be good, it should be fun, but I find it mostly boring. The map is huge, but the player "running" speed makes crossing it abysmal. There's honestly not a lot of enemies so it's just boring as hell to just walk around for 30 minutes doing simple objectives. I get you want slow movement to prioritize slower paced gameplay, but that doesn't translate well to the large maps. On top of that this update broke the game audio, screwed up weapon recoil, and you added a "DLC" which is just a bunch of meh cosmetics for $8? This game has so much potential to be an amazing milsim, and I still believe in it, but the current direction it's going in is not good. Please listen to the feedback, don't shut it out.

I’ve played the game for 1 year and I would highly recommend this to those in the tacticool space. With guns you can customize, physics, and missions where you fight either a ai or other players, you create bonds with others and create a good liking to the game. However, my only concern would be the young player base with ages 4-12 as a problem. Despite this, would recommend!

❤️‍🩹

I was in the operation Delia lobby. Someone killed me more than 20 times. I tried kicking him, but he wouldn’t let me cause he kept spawn killing me and like I said he killed me 20 times without getting banned and then when I decided to kill him 10 times I got banned this makes no sense and then I got banned for 24 hours for team killing him 10 times while he team killed me 20 remove this stupid team killing thing it makes no sense

Great game in general. I have one problem tho, me and my buddies were messing around and suddenly I get temporarily banned for teamkilling?
This absolutely ruined our once a week gaining sesh and I’m here to ask Why?!?

If teamkilling is a setting then it shouldn’t be banable. Maybe the strict TK setting should have a server ban, but In no way should anybody ever be banned from multiplayer for playing the way they want too. Not to mention, the host also gets kicked from their own lobby if they are teamkilling?!?! 

If you want to fix this add a feature that bans per server, not for the entirety of multiplayer, or just remove banning entirely since TK is an optional setting..

there’s no reason the ai’s detection system should let the enemy spot me from across the map to then alert the rest of the other enemies near them, exactly where i am when i haven’t even fired a shot, and why do they keep on shooting at me through floors, walls, and ceilings, or snapping to me when i peak a corner, etc etc etc etc etc etc etc

Improvements: Helmets can deflect bullet
                           Vest actually protects you little bit
                            Bleeding system
                            Enemies throw grenades

Gear: Altyn Helmet can be removed as a choice
          Shields added bulletproof glass
          Face shields, visors, 
          Bandages, medkit, pain killers, 
          Helmets that have medic symbols on top
          
Guns: Sg553, Mac Ix, MPR RimFire, Sam7sf, Vector, 
CZ P-10.
                          Ak can put on sights
                           Uzi, Ak-74U.

reviews.review_title: Love the game, Hate MTX for paid games
reviews.review_description:
This game is awesome. It's the best VR shooter I've played and has actively improved my marksmanship in real life. The gun handling is amazing, and the level design is awesome. What isn't awesome is having 30$ worth of DLC for a 20$ indie game that's still in early access. We're reaching EA levels of DLC to game price ratio. Keep in mind, I'm not against supporting some of my favorite game developers. They need to put food into their family's bellies the same as anyone else's and being an indie dev likely makes that harder. I am against microtransactions in games that I've already paid for.

 "Well, Breadio, the difference between microtransactions and DLC is pedantic." You may say. I believe the difference is that a DLC (like Dahlia, or the FBI pack) add substantially different content or gameplay from the main game, that couldn't justifiably be added and remain in the scope of the main game without being under the pretense of a DLC. While a microtransaction is just paying for a minor and/or cosmetic change/addition that can be easily gone without, and I believe the newest DLC, the winter cosmetics pack, is just actively a microtransaction, as all it adds are 2 pieces of clothing (not counting retextures) and a paywalled version of the m4a1, which we already have in the base game, but with the ability to retexture it.

This is a relatively scummy business practice, and I hope the developers/publisher either adds something more substantially different to the "DLC" like the FBI pack, or makes the "DLC" free like the pacific self defense force pack.

reviews.review_title: You'll pay them to develop it
reviews.review_description:
This had the potential to be a great game. It was $10 when I bought it, and now it's $18 or so. They're also getting ready to add new missions which will be hidden behind a pay wall, so buy the game once, then buy the rest of the game once you own the first bit. 

Just another money hungry developer taking advantage of people.

Also, almost the entire player base is made up of small children, so good luck finding that tactical experience that you're looking for unless you have a group already.

Finally, the "staff" for this game is composed of the most utterly toxic individuals I have ever had the misfortune of dealing with.

I know what people are gonna say “well dont tk” but it’s hard not to when you have somebody on your team who loves to tk without any purpose, but after somebody tkd me over 15 times I got mad and decided to tk him which ended up to me getting a 12 hour temporary ban, which my friend just got this game and I was planning on teaching him how to play but now I can’t

reviews.review_title: Go fu## your self if you gave it 1 star
reviews.review_description: YES THERE IS TEAM KILLING BUT JUST LEAVE THE LOBBY also this game has the BEST pvp maps for snipers shotguns and ars and smgs the maps are amazing and are beautiful but there is one down side if your not good the game is mid you do need some skill and good aim but it is still a good game just add more content like new maps for snipers and maybe new game modes like DMZ from cod but yeah the game is great don't quit Lil bro

Tactical assault vr has amazing replay ability and has the best gun play of any vr game hands down. Bots are kinda cracked and sometimes will just not see you. some improvements such as thermal scopes would be great as well as more multiplayer modes would be awesome. Has great potential to be a competitive shooter.

Lemme start with I love this game for tactical training. 

It’s such a great challenge. 

What are the chances y’all are looking at more striking abilities? I know you can butt strike them sort of. Even though everything goes black when you touch anyone. But a simple push kick button or the ability to just grab and toss them a little would be fun, maybe punch or strip a gun from them. Idk just an idea. 

Also it would be cool if we could raid the dead bodies for gear. Like magazines, bangs or health. Whatever. Either way living the game still. Thank you!

although the game is good the community ruins the experience because i am constantly being met by people kicking me because i simply said no to wanting to join their faction or i am being sexually harrassed by adults and there is zero method to block any users so im forced to play with them until i can votekick them which usually fails since people side with the ones who sexually harrass for some reason

reviews.review_title: Extraction Is a Mess and This Is Why
reviews.review_description: You'd think Extraction would at least give you a 10 second countdown before it takes off but if you're not ON it's nuts you get a mission fail. I'd love to Extract believe me, I just don't want to run to a spot with no COVER in a game where you can be one-tapped for peaking your head out. Other than that game is soild and would recommend to anyone who's looking for a realistic shooting experience.

reviews.review_title: Love this game, one HUGE problem...
reviews.review_description: DLC. Paid DLC for a game I paid money for already. This is probably just me and my morals pulling the rating down, so it's still a five. It's pretty realistic firearms-wise, and it's one of those games you can mess around in with friends OR lock in and be tactical with those same friends, and it's just great. I really don't want to have to spend an extra 27 dollars to have all the content, and possibly more in the future, but I probably still will just so I can have everything. It's just one of those things that can be a slight nuisance, but still recommend it.

Very fun, great community (mostly), is as difficult as you want it to be, lots of maps with lots of modifiers you can add and lots of replayability. Will say some people in the community are awful, there are some people (especially little kids) who will scream slurs at you (especially in pvp), there are also a handful of people who will team kill for no d@mn reason whatsoever (though the game does have measurements to prevent that), and the biggest gripe I have is that in pvp loads and loads of people spawn camp to the point where you can't even spawn your loadout and kill them before your spawn protection wears off. Great game though really fun missions and if you get lucky and get into a server without spawn camping in pvp it can be really fun. The devs are constantly updating it (btw they SOMETIMES add stuff that they say they won't, so don't get your hopes down immediately if they say they aren't adding something) adding new things like weapons, missions, and more. I have poured probably hundreds of hours into this game and love it so much. Thank you to the dev team for making such an amazing and awesome game.

The developers definitely know what there doing. The game is perfect with how the enemies act, the gun play, the missions, the customization. Just somethings we need, please add it so that we have to drive/fly to the mission we want to go to instead of the loading screen, and also please fix the gun getting stuck in the door or the wall.

reviews.review_title: ONE TAPPING BOTS, NVGs that don’t work.
reviews.review_description:
Fix the AI bots.. I’ve been playing since early access in 2022 and these bots still have the exact same problem.. THEY SEE THROUGH WALLS. Since 2022, we’ve gotten new maps we have to PAY for, new guns, practically new everything, yet the AI still doesn’t get updated. 

That’s 4 years of being ONE TAPPED or having a bot know where I am without even having eyesight on me. It’s ridiculous. Game is good but these bots kill it every single time. It’s not a skill issue when I barely load into a game, clear ONE building, go up some stairs only to have a bot looking directly at me with no line of sight before and ONE TAP me before I can even react. 

Another problem is the Night Vision. It isn’t real. It’s just a filter with brighter gamma. NVGs don’t work in dark rooms. You can bump up the brightness on your NVGs and it still is completely pitch black on some parts of the map. Then if you try and use your flashlight, it makes it worse. The light brightness is multiplied by 100 and makes it look like a pitch white ray of light that doesn’t do anything for you at all. Lots of things that should have been fixed since 2023. This game is taking a strange direction. It’s clear the dev doesn’t know what this game wants to be. If it’s a tactical shooter, make it one. If it’s a Ghost recons, SOCOM type deal, then make it that but fix the bugs that hold the game back.

PLEASE add Hydra riser mounts and Axon or flat pressure pads, Why? Because it looks amazing  and honestly it makes the gun more realistic because if you look at the AR Model we have with the peq box or the peq15 with the laser on the right side it makes the gun mostly a left-handed rifle and with a Axon button with the wire connected to the peq15 or box and the flashlight then it makes sense. Now it would make sense to have the flashlight on the left side; you can use your thumb to push the button. For the Hydra riser mount, it looks amazing. I know some people will say it doesn't look good with the red dot being too tall, but if it still kills, it kills. Now I understand that this is for the game entirely, but I think this would help the game with realism features on the guns. This is from a few people whom I asked what we should add and they said to add these attachments and add a gun customization like moving the PEQ laser or the flashlight on the rail. Or moving the red dot further back for the Hydra and back to the Axon pressure button, if we're going to add both Hydra and Axon we would have to add a wrap tape around the wire which also helps with the realism of a CQB gun system. One example is from GBRS videos. And finally if not all the cqb videos or video games they always use pressure switches for easier access to their laser and light, now it doesn't have to be big the pressure switch or button doesn't have to react with the environment if you accidentlly hit a wall it doesn't have to expose your white light or anything but more of a design and looks but it can work with different settings of having it stuck in one settings of having a button momentarily flash the light or have it on completely.

I love this game I've been playing since it's release on quest 2 and it's only getting better. The only thing I'd like to see changed is more realistic gun sounds specifically for the m4 and m16 family. I'm not asking for actual gun sounds I'm just asking that the guns don't sound like toys when we fire them. Realistic gun sounds will add to the immersion of gunfights making the game overall better to play. This is one of my main issues with the game considering I avoid using most of my favorite weapons due to the sounds being too fake

reviews.review_title: A true HARDCORE cqb milsim… finally
reviews.review_description: I luv this game to death. It’s the best game on quest. It’s my favorite game. I have over 200 hours in this game and it is a hard core cqb/ Milsim game devoted to real hardcore players who care about strategical fps games. Don’t play unless u like teamwork. This game is not for self centered players who think they need to be the center of the action and feel like they’re in bf 6. That’s what forefront is for. Anyways buy the game and at least the dahlia expansion, it’s ALMOST mandatory for a full swat experience

This is the best tactical shooter game and please do not lisen to the haters because this game is fun and crazy.  But  one problem in the game is the little kids not playing the game right and we cant do everything about but you can kick them or go to a good lobby. I hily recommend this game it has good gamplay and numbers of weapons in cloding the maps. But  all i have to say is it is werth your time game incredible game.👍👍
     
    O and one thing for the developer please fix the flashlight glitch please because when you tern the flashlight on it gose through walls, so thank you for this  wonderful game

I’ve been an avid VR enthusiast for almost a decade now, and this is probably one of the better standalone 'milsim' experiences out there.

Lemme start with the pros:
Great breaching mechanics
Alot of loadout versatility
Good weapon design
Great map design
Fun reloading
Shooting range has a proc gen killhouse
Ect, ect.

Cons:
Low poly graphics (headache inducing)
Poor audio design
A pretty decent amount of bugs
Confusing UI design.
The 'DLC' is just mediocre cosmetics

All in all, it’s a good game if you don’t care about cosmetic stuff. The reloading mechanics are probably what drew me into this game.

reviews.review_title: Holy moly guacamole this game is awesome
reviews.review_description:
This is by far the best FPS game I've played in VR. Forget Pavlov and Onward, this game is gonna give you the best bang for your buck. The gameplay is immersive enough to make you forget the low-poly graphics, and the weapon mechanics are really lovable.

I said in the review before that team-killing was a massive problem. Thank our Lords 2080 games and Hammer Fire interactive for adding the player reputation 🫰🥹

But other than that, TAVR is a game I would recommend for any shooter enthusiast, CQB fanatic, or even just someone looking for something away from the same-old same-old. 

Dev team, I don't know what you've got going on behind the scenes, but you're clearly doing something VERY right. You've got tons of potential, and you know how to perfectly blend VR and the real world. Keep it up!

I've been playing the game for a while, and it has great graphics (for a VR game), runs well, cool, amazing updates, and guns, but there are serious problems.

btw, is there a Discord for this game?

1. The enemies
The enemies can detect you from anywhere, even if they're not looking at you, when you're at long range, although this doesn't happen if you're very close. However, this problem doesn't occur at the start; it will if you fire a shot. I don't know why 

Their aim is weird. I feel like their aim is constant, and whether they shoot at long range or close up, their hit-to-miss ratio feels the same. Take, for example, the mission "Breaking Whisper." When I played, and I went over a hill, they automatically locked on to me even tho i think he wasn't even looking at me, but he shot and hit 2rounds (out of 5) before I ducked, and I nearly died.

2. The wave of enemies at the end of most missions.
In missions like "Breaking Whisper." "Trident Lighting." and "Shattered Eagle." Once you complete the main objective, there's a wave of enemies that come, AND ALWAYS KNOW WHERE YOU ARE

suggestions 

 A bot team for single player missions like in Ready or Not (I know that's unrealistic and hard)

 Color choice on guns like the "HK416D" being tan/brown, I know this is the OG color of the "D" version, but maybe a black version on regular HK416 

Tattoos. . . cause there cool

 Patches like in-ground branch

 More vest options 

 A ballistic shield that has bulletproof glass

 Believe it or not, flash bangs are not meant to "neutralize" a person; it is a distraction, although they can scare someone. So a stinger grenade, cs gas, door wedges

Make armor work

minor bugs/fixes
 In the map collapsing star (the gas station map in the paid access missions), there's a bug with the walls, where sometimes the enemies will see you through the wall and just shoot the wall randomly (they don't hit you)

I ran out of words :( it wont let type any more


Conclusion, I would still buy.

Tactical assault vr is probably the best Tactical military game

 In my opinion it is pretty good I got it in early 2025 am pretty sure and the updates have been good my Dad also played and he was in the infantry and he said it was pretty good so yeah pretty realistic

I have played this game more than any other VR game to date, and this game is 100% worth the price. I’ve played it since it first came out and it has come a long way, but I think there are still some kinks that should be worked out:

Player speed:
For the love of god, please add something that fixes the player running speed. I absolutely love the slow paced gameplay, and the game shouldn’t turn into a COD replica, but the size of the maps does not translate well when the player speed is that slow. 

Health system:
Maybe add some sort of basic health system, not just the shots, to allow for solo players to revive themselves and patch up teammates.

Parachuting:
Add a mission modifier to allow for parachuting into certain maps. Ik this could be absolutely horrendous to make and might break the game if you just parachute to the objectives, but it would be so cool to have that realism added.

Friendly AI:
Add a friendly AI ability so you can have solo squads for offline enjoyers.


All in all, the game is amazing. Has its slight bugs here and there, but all games do. I’m excited for future updates

Good game, not bad community surprisingly. The gun controls are very satisfying and good, especially the palm reloads. Co-op is good and so is the PvP, i usually have a good time. Not a lot of squeakers. The enemies are a bit dumb, i understand this isnt the full release but if we could get something like Ready Or Not that would be awesome.

reviews.review_title: Good game but with the sniping...
reviews.review_description: New sniping update its a bit off to me. You get snipers, binoculars, but you dont get a big sniping map? The new map isnt big enough or at least its blocked by rocks, mountains and buildings where you can only get a shot off maybe 2 guys from maybe 200 meters, then you have to move to find more targets, barely any sniping spots as well. Everything is either above you or you find a hill that barely sees over a village. Maybe theres something im missing but as a sniper id like to go prone and just pick targets off. I should be able to pick off alot of targets further than 150-200 meters in one spot and see a wide range of the area.

The best game in Meta Horizon, I certainly find the graphics incredible missions amazing everything in the game is incredible, although the missions resemble each other just in and out should add more types of things for PvP mode, a 4vs4 mode in PvP mode would be great.

Great game, this is a game i have never doubted or had any troubles with hank or lag or bugs, this games is complete. The challenge is real, this game has consequences and I love it. The one thing i would suggest is maybe smaller maps where theres more clearing rooms and hallways. I just feel like alot of the maps im shooting a guy half a mile away and the maps that are more close quarters its ethier a very small map or its half long range half short range and no medium to small range. Theres multi-player too. Pvp or Pve, one thing i will say is in Pvp I have a huge habit of accidentally shooting my teammate, may be a skill issue there but I have done it more than a handful of times on accident and get called out for it immediately. Very fun and interesting and its a game i always come back to.

I love this game but I want them to add ai bots that can be on your team I know it will be a lot of work but sometimes when you play with other people they can be toxic they want to do other missions that you don’t want to do it can be laggy and the missions are hard to do by yourself and when I’m it missions I can be even jump scared 😂

First the g3 would be a amazing gun to add along side that add the ak4 as a modernized g3 second the m14 as a another classic rifle or sniper and with its modernized brother the m14 ebr thrid HK 53 as a 556 mp5 to gibe the smgs a classic weapon and a another mp5 variant the mp5sd to be a internally suppressed mp5 and as my last one wa2000 to be a cool German sniper so good game just needs more guns

reviews.review_title: Please Read and Amazing game thank you
reviews.review_description:
Please continue to read this even after this not so good start but I need to let y'all know that the DEADSHOT UPDATE could've been a ton better with all its potential, I mean it's a small development team so I don't think badly about this game but I mean a paywall behind the m4 camos where we thought all guns could be camouflaged and free too like that's a bit of a divert from expectations already but also seriously please listen to the community like I know there's like 6 testers involved and I've been led to believe by a lot that the community doesn't get as big a say in future additions as promised but I could be way wrong just please though this list below I've heard countless people want so please work on adding these and the ghillie suits are apparently not working because when I shot at a gunner on a truck with me using a suppressor hidden in the grass he found me instantly and started firing at me and the bombers being in sandbox convention center is a glitch I found and the broken camo m40a5 selection box too and not being able to rack the saiga12 anymore and there not being a box to choose camos for the m40a5 for but the breakable glass bottle was honestly the best part of the update like it was really fun to mess around with I just wish it was in multiplayer and also multiplayer is extremely laggy now but just all around I wish the update could've matched the hype but I'm sure that hotfixes will deal with the big technical issues and I'm PRAYING you drop a ton more guns for us because honestly the guns are just my favorite part so only seeing the Kc2 was a letdown but yeah So I love this game and have been playing it for 2 years now and I guess the game reviews are for rating the game specifically in which case it absolutely gets 5 stars and if I can suggest I'd say we could benefit from some guns maybe branching off a bit from special ops/military weapons (don't get me wrong I love them) but we could use potentially some tactical lever actions, maybe some revolvers like the Colt Python or Raging Hunter, WE ABSOLUTELY NEED A FARM MAP like with rolling corn fields you can use ghillies in and snipe from (by the way like it shocked me that no new snipers were added in a sniper update so that could be worked on) and not like the ranch map but I mean like fields everywhere and some actual mountain scenery instead of the constant use of arid desert like lets get some variety, and I love the northern lights in orion and I love hidden forest meaning we need some crazy big mountains like ive seen you can do it with trident lightning but we need some towering snowcapped mountains with pine trees and those same ambient howling and wind noises from hidden forest and or ABSOLUTELY use some inspiration from Moraine Lake in Alberta Canada like that would be awesome and we could do like a civilian defense expansion or something along those lines, we absolutely need a gunsmith area or something where you can change colors and parts in whatever gun you choose, and while y'all are expanding the LMG section a Sig Sauer M250 would be great as well as the XM7, and I'm seeing some suggestions for a 25v25 server and that may be a hurdle but that would be insane, and absolutely a Barrett M82 and a Barrett MRAD, some more AR-15 platforms, PLEASE ADD MY MOST FAVORITE TACTICAL MARLIN 1894 DARK SERIES IM BEGGING YOU PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE!!!! And we definitely need a huge mountain map not like ridges or hills but like full Yosemite Valley type mountain maps and with the mew Deadshot map then it would be a prime map for sniping, potentially a way more advanced medical system (TQ's, Epinephrine, Water?), refined bolt mechanics so it's actually 4 stage instead of a straight pull, and definitely an option to choose between what rounds you want to use like Tracer, AP, FMJ, and I'd even go as far to say Incendiary rounds because those would be absolutely amazing in the game although I know it'd take a bit of work on the physics and animations, and I know there's a huge push for community modding which I think would be amazing as long as it's usable on standalone as well even though I know it's a lot to ask, potentially a city map with some rappelling included, definitely a 2011, but all of these would be great sorry I know it's really long but I've been thinking about these for a while. Thank you Jarvis for a great game!


Anyways Here Is My Ridiculous Niche Mission Idea

This may sound insane and almost definitely not happening but we absolutely could use a space map like if we're going nuclear as seen in the Orion map then we need a space map (there's no way to phrase that without it sounding ridiculous) but like potentially a map where enemies prevent a private military rocket from taking off (you'd be in the rocket) and getting into orbit, while you're in orbit with your team or solo you must use computers to jam missile signals to prevent disaster from other countries while counter satellites (real thing) approach aggressively towards the spacecraft you and your team would be in and the actual way that militaries have been testing to stop these is like basically an EMP deployer from the sides of spacecraft, so to keep it a shooter and not necessarily stray away from your central idea of the game we'd use the EMP deployers to i guess simulate firearms as much as you could get whilst in space. (Also even if you fail the mission and the nukes go off then that would be one insane view from the spacecraft). But if you've read this far I thank you so much and just wanted to say you've got an amazing game here and so stick with it for as long as you can! Thank you so much Jarvis keep up the great work

P.S. - Sorry but I might just repost this review every couple of days until I start seeing the stuff from this list in the game (I really don't like the way that sounded mean sorry!!!) but yeah even with this bit of a flop update I mean it laid the groundwork for bigger things so if I could tell you anything it would be STAY WITH THE GAME AND DONT ABANDON IT!!! I've seen countless games be abandoned before they get good and it'd be a nightmare if the same happened to TAVR. Thank you though for a great time!

Technically the game is amazing. Fantastic mechanics, good gunplay, lots of equipment and weapons to vary loadouts. The game is clearly being made by a dev team that cares and is committed to making a fantastic tactical vr game. Unfortunately the community ruins this game. It's either people who want to play far too seriously or kids, there's no in-between. Given that this is primarily a multiplayer game, this makes it hard to recommend. If you have a core group of people who you enjoy playing with and are willing to play with you then go for it. Don't bother with general matchmaking, it's soul destroying.

I've had this game since I bought my vr and it is my favorite because it is fun and not too repetitive. But since my vr controller broke I can't play i don't have enough money to buy one and same with my parents

why did you add tk to the game because when i do it i get banned so i thought that maybe y'all should have certain part just be for one v ones because i hate getting kicked for 12 hours so y'all should create a thing just for everybody to kill each other your player Jace.M one more thing is why does it stack

reviews.review_title: Easily the best Milsim on META thus far.
reviews.review_description: My buddy and I are former military and we love this game. It helps us keep our skills sharp while allowing for us to goof off if we need to. We have a handful of suggestions for the Devs to add to future updates from new mission concepts to minor details that would really add to the immersion. Otherwise we're always looking forward to the next update.

Amazing  for an early access game. Don’t think about the low-poly graphics..
The updates you devs come up with is epic. 


P.SPlease do add flags for our arms, helmets and chest plates.

reviews.review_title: the game is good but some host are not
reviews.review_description: the game overall is great and pretty realistic but if your playing pvp SOME host will kick you if you start killing them to much or they start loosing and SOME host never start a mission in the mission mode but other than that the game is great

I have had the game for about 3 years now and I still can come back to it when I get burnt out on a different game new update and every few weeks the bundles or free or on sell great game to play if you’re looking to do some sim or just shoot rockets at enemies ps can I please get the 2 newest bundle with the simie new bolt achine sniper

This is an amazing fun game for anyone of any age into tactical and strategic simulators. It has a huge arsenal of a lot of different guns and weapons including a lot of amazing DLCs and packs. The graphics are not violent but the tactics and little details are perfect to real life this is why I believe that this is one of the best games I have ever played
The best tactical shooter game by far the physics are great the utility is vast and the guns are amazing  with loads of maps and operations to run and all the expansions are worth it

this game shows that graphics aren't everything in games. the only problem that i have is ours messing around with my friends in a lobby and we were shooting each other and i got 10 team kills because we were messing around in a lobby just for fun and then i get banned for team killing.
I was playing tactical assault and I stabbed this one kid and he started saying slurs and calling me Retarded, eventually got so angry. He started killing random people instead of blaming it on me. ￼

Not that into multiplayer games usually but this is great if you go into missions with a good crew.   Can play single player too and recently been updated with more maps.

Highly recommend 👌
This game is nearly perfect, the graphics could use a little work but that’s about it. A zombie like mode would be pretty cool, probably as something for Halloween maybe.

The developers did a great job making this game. I love the sights and all but if y’all could make a G43 or G45 riser for the eotech and aim dot sight the community will be very grateful. I do request that you add the MPX SMG, Noveske Chainsaw in the tan and black variant, M16A4, XM7, and a black OG HK416. One thing that I have been DIEING for is a Barrett 50 cal. It would be hilarious to see an enemy combatant go flying. I would like to see is a MK38. It’s basically if the M249 and the 240B had a baby. It’s chambered in 308 and has the fire rate of the 249. Also, please add shadows to Oculus. I’ve been dying for shadows. They don’t even have to be good, but please add shadows for quest. Could yall also add IR lasers that the enemies can’t see but only people with nods can. Same goes for flash lights. We also need infrared strobes that go on top of the helmet so that way we won’t accidentally kill our teammates and get kicked.

I recommend two categories of missions, SWAT and military. Swat could consist of void and Trident Lighting. The military missions could consist of, incoming storm,sever snake, and hammer fire. Please add more swat esc maps. Like, I think a school shootout would be cool and the main objective is to extract as many victims as possible and neutralize the threat. I don’t have much for the military esc missions but those are just suggestions, please take those into consideration.

 The one problem I have is the little timmies kicking you for team killing them once. It’s like the timmies kick you for not doing whatever they want. But over all, it’s a great game. Definitely recommended. Only if you can deal with kids.

You have ruined the game by making DLC’s that cost money. I get that you have to make money but still. That’s ridiculous. Although I like the game, I will get a refund if needed.


But overall, it’s a good game but I don’t like the buyable DLC’s make them free for gods sakes.


Ps, ADD CROWBARS PLEASE

First off I really like the game and play it almost every day, especially the maps the came with the SWAT DLC. But one thing I dont like is that there is only Swat black, Grey and olive. Which is okay.. But I feel like adding new colors would be cool like S.W.A.T. Camo and brown which its more what real Swat teams use. And it's would be great if it was added. But overall great game.

Great game , but should have had fist to fist fighting and drones put overall great game please add this tactical assault devs and should add or you drive the swat truck to the call please consider this cause.I know a lot of people that want this so devs.Please add this

It
 a great game for people like shooting guns and toxical stuff. It has constant updates and it's one of my favorite games. The price is worth it.

Add saved looks, more sniper"not higher caliber than 338", sniper bundle, gille suites, thermal sights but it can only work for a few seconds, add different muzzles like flash hider, add new sniper map, add a sagia 12 shotgun"it would be like a classic only maybe a muzzle", add grips on semi automatic snipers, add poison gas, and make the gas masks block vision just a little or blur, but make a thing were you choose to have it or not, make patches like flags or symbols, add missions to unlock a drum mag, and just add a red dot back to the Glock 18.

 Thank you for listening to my idea about the Gillie suits 

New ideas add more assault rifles with longer barrels, more mcx rifles, add armor piercing/incendiary/ bullets

This is one of the best FPS games on VR. It can run on anything, great weapon and avatar customization, and enough maps to make any other game look sad. The only thing, is it's easy to mess up your attachments. "Mussle 1" isn't helpful. It'd also be nice, if you could change your mag type. Other than that, it's a great game.

reviews.review_title: I wish i could rate it more than 5.
reviews.review_description:
Where do I start?!
This game has been one of my favorite VR games, if not my number 1.
The graphics are good enough to where it doesn't break your headset as soon as you load up.
The wide selection of guns, attachments, and avatar customization is just awesome.
For a Early Access game it's amazing. 10/10

Its genuinely such a good game for the price. The guns feel great and the head camera is dope. Multi-player is really fun as well however, you will end up playing with kids/teens that ruin it at times. Some people try to make everyone play super tactical and play by there rules or you get kicked. From what I can tell you can't kick the host if they are problematic. Overall good game but Multi-player is a hit or miss when playing with people. Worth the purchase though!
Ok. I could not stress this enough. THE. BEST. GAME. EVER. MADE. I WOULD SELL EVERYTHING I OWN TO BE PART IF THIS WONDER. Please buy it it’s so tactical and worth it!

I love this game with all I can but one thing that annoys the crap out of me is when I have my shield out and I holster it hen unholster my pistol all the accessories turn off, so I have to put my shield away and turn them on which leaves me open! Only concern! But amazing game anyway!

I’ve been playing this game for a while and I’ve even joined a military simulation while playing I’ve been playing for over a year now and I’ve seen pretty much every update. This game is really good would recommend.

reviews.review_title: Easily 5 stars but devs one thing
reviews.review_description: I truly love this game. It’s incredible. I do want a few things to come though. It would be really cool if y’all added camos to guns. I would also really like to see a Barrett MRAD come to the game. Also I would think adding a revolver would be a nice touch. Other than that this game has the best gun mechanics, great maps, and tons of fun things to do.

I play vr a lot and this has to be one of my worst decisions of buying a game IN MY OPINION. For 20$ ??? You could do so much better than what it’s at right now. I can’t go into a game with random without someone cursing you out. Plus the graphics aren’t that good and so are the mechanics for the guns when you try to reload. I hope you can put this review into consideration. Plus you can’t even run in this game and it takes for Everrr to walk around

reviews.review_title: Best Tactical Shooter on the Meta Market
reviews.review_description:
In my humble opinion, this game has given me the opportunity to experience a Tactical Setting.

When team cohesion comes naturally, it's an oh so satisfying feeling.

As of writing this, I am downloading the "Breaking Whisper" update, I look forward to seeing more content in the future.

Also, I think a grenade launcher underbarrel attachment would go a long way...or Rocket Launchers as a back slot (like the shield). 

As of writing this update, I am awaiting the Ghilli update: I am glad to see Rocket Launchers are on the way as well as a plethora of new equipment.

One last suggestion: (because I'm invested in seeing this game flourish) a personal First Aid pouch with a bandage and/or Stim that can be used on yourself when you're downed and alone without support. (It would need to be a one time use for obvious reasons)

I love this game it makes hanging out with my buddy's fun and not boring it just sucks when I play alone and join random peoples servers and all they do is TK but I could do it one time and get banned for 24hrs when they can just get away with it and there is people who know how to exploit this game making it almost impossible to kill them so I would still play just this needs to be fixed

Hackers shoot through walls, kids are screaming the whole time, you get kicked for no reason, weapons don’t work, people get under the maps, the list goes on and on and the devs do nothing about it so there is zero fun lobbies, been here since day one and just deleted the game, try forefront instead.

reviews.review_title: Important feedback on new ds update!
reviews.review_description: The new dead shot and convention maps are fantastic! But the new update brings some bugs at least for me. I can no longer change the FOV on my NVG’s, which changing the FOV was the only way my head wouldn’t hurt using my favorite style: Single right scope. Also whole NVG’s are on the topic, my friend is heavily disoriented with picture in picture mode, so I think removing legacy was a mistake. one more bug I noticed was the game constantly turning the render full body option off, it did this every time I loaded into a new mission or lobby or the main menu. Wonderful game and I’m so happy with the new environmental story telling of Retaliatory Bite, but please see this and hopefully fix the stuff listed!

First off this is easily one of the best games on Meta for PVE missions and CO OP game play. 

Only downside to the PVE is the speed of which you can move, it’s very slow paced but it forces you to be smart, tactical and realistic. Can’t really act like John Wick in here all the time. 

Great weapon choices, great choices of tools you can take in with you (health shots, wire cutters, lock pick, door camera, grenades) 

NOW THE BAD. PVP.

I am a full grown man for reference and have been playing VR since the release of the original quest. This team killing is absolutely ridiculous. Attempted to play online two days in a row for me to get team killed at spawn over and over with nothing happening to the guy team killing. The dude was even bragging on how many of his own team he killed.If you want Online go to vail or Forefront. 

DEVS PLEASE READ. 
Very frustrating and makes your game look like trash for allowing this. Makes it seems like a cheap knock off game.
hyperrealistic gun mechanics. if you get a gun stock the gun mechanics make the game that much better, you really can manouever like a tier one operator

I think it would be cool to restrict outfits camo and accesory colour as a host because when one dude is wearing a fbi costume and the other is in an urban ghille made to look like trash it REALLY ruins the realisim and how immersive it is. I also think it would be cool to customize gaurding enemies in the room randomizer. And lastly add a singleplayer mode with friendly npcs that you can command (like ready or not style) and make it a dlc. Thats all thanks!

reviews.review_title: New update is glitched and crap
reviews.review_description: Game is awesome when it works. With this new update I truely believe they destroyed the game. The game constantly glitches. Hopefully they put an update soon because if they don't then that means the game is dead.
Best vr shooter out there but don't friendly fire cuz i was and then got banned for 12 hours cuz i tk'd 10 people but anyways get the game

It is, for the most part, an amazing ready or not-esque Milsim shooter and has a generally great community. There are lots of weapons and a lot of attention to detail, as well as heaps of different approaches for missions.
It truly would be nice to see a revolver as a sidearm, as they are still used by special forces sush as G.I.G.N and other militaries. Celery worth it game only held back by some of the players

reviews.review_title: Honest review about Tactical Assault VR
reviews.review_description:
To start, I LOVE this game. The concept - the execution, I love it all. There’s good options for weapons and there’s plenty of clothing/armor options for setting up your character. There’s also plenty of missions to run and different kinds of missions if you get bored of running the normal ones. 

But now some downsides. The multiplayer, sometimes it’s ok, and other times you get servers filled with TK’ers and stuff like that.  Also if you can’t spend money you’re kinda f#cked. Most of my personal favorite missions are from Operation Dahlia so it’s behind a paywall; not to say the entire game is boring if you don’t have it but it’s more fun. But really the downsides are outweighed by the good sides. Also if you have a problem with the multiplayer - just don’t play it. Personally I run it with friends, that’s the best option.

Making players wait for a map from a dlc just to when it drops add in uneeded things which make it obvious they barely focused on the map like enemies seeing and shooting players through smoke like come on ontop of adding 2 more assault rifles while shotguns lack choices same with lmgs also to make the dev angry add revolvers im not in discord so cant ban me lol

One of the best shooter games I’ve ever played. If you want a realistic experience for shooting games then this is it. Yes the graphics might be bad but that doesn’t change anything that’s just how this game is. The community is ok some bad people there and then but this game is great. The updates are usually high quality and fun to play. Really a great game with great content uploaded every month.

reviews.review_title: Best vr game I've played so far
reviews.review_description: As far as shooters go this is the best I've played on quest.... We definitely need a active shooter mission I think that would complete the name TAVR lol maybe a airport or school.. a presidential speech or mall and as far as weapons we need some revolvers a  rpg proximity mines.. Maybe different magazine sizes with added weight for example the glock 18 needs the 33rd mags.... How about a battlefield type mode where there are 30 players on a huge map great work man I play literally every chance I get I'm iamsyre1996

reviews.review_title: Genuinely one of my favourite VR games
reviews.review_description:
I think this game is great and I love it in a lot of ways like a character customization and OK AI  overall the community is very nice except a few outliers. It’s fun to play tactical sometimes, but some people are way too strict. if you want a ￼￼￼ good￼ PVE experience I would recommend this game. But there’s one thing I really don’t like about it. It’s the PVP tell me it feels like this game is definitely meant to be solely a PVE game to me at least the maps are just not meant for PVP. Some maps are completely one-sided, but the trenches map is pretty good just the defensive team because their uniforms are all black. It’s extremely hard to see ￼ ￼them some ￼times. I really don’t think ￼ PVP is where ￼this game shines and if you get knocked out or something like when you’re on the ground and only people can revive you in the PV￼￼￼￼￼E mode all you have to do is click change loadout and you can skip it in the PVP there’s nothing you can do ￼￼￼￼ it’s really frustrating sometimes. but overall, I think it’s great ￼ a great game I’ve been playing for well over two years ￼￼ I think this game is on the road to something great!
￼￼￼
This is such a great game but pls make it where that can be more that ten people in a pvp lobby

reviews.review_title: Great Game! (My Favourite One Out There)
reviews.review_description:
As a true TAVR player that has been playing for around 2 and a half years, this game is amazing. The amount of work all of the developers have done is astounding!

With the recent Deadshot and Operation Dahlia update, things have only gotten better. The weapon system, AI,  everything is just so powerful! The only downside I do have of this game is the graphics. I know it’s supposed to like as it is, but having an option to make the graphics look realistic would be insane! (And a more intense bullet drop)

The community is also very nice. Sometimes I’ll join lobbies of older people, and they’ll be the funniest, kindest, people (even toward the younger players). Sure there may be team killers and graders, but you can just kick them!

This game is my favourite VR game out there and there is nothing the devs or someone can do that can change my mind.

- Thank You, from Tweedle.Dum

reviews.review_title: IF YOU HAVENT TRIED THIS, GET ON IT!!
reviews.review_description: This game is honestly the most amazing game ive seen on standalone quest, the maps? AMAZING, the guns? REALISTIC, the features? AWESOME. I would literaly rant about this game for HOURS, when i first got into it (about a year ago) it wasnt the greatest, but with the updates the dev aded ITS HONESTLY THE BEST. He added TWO updates in a MONTH A MONTH! The missions in this game are all fun, with my favourite being "Hidden forrest" and the Multiplayer is just AHH sooooo good. I ussualy hop on with friends and we do missions together or play the shootout mode that was rcntl added. Now about the "features". With every map being a diferent environment and the camos being endless! Also paired with the gun selection being HUGE TOO you can match pretty much everything. So thats my review I LOVE THIS GAME and to the dev YOU ARE AWESOME!!!!! ...but would be awesome if you added the M82 or the M200 just AMR's in general. THANK YOU

This game is single handedly one of the best shooters ever put to VR. However, the moderation and player base is lacking. The Autokick is fickle and liable to instantly kick you for an accidental shot, there’s no way to report a player, and if a host for a lobby is the embodiment of evil, there’s no repercussion.

The player base is awful. Outside of the occasional group of cool people or a Milisim lobby, it’s like the Wild West. Co-op is filled with “tk servers” which completely negate the PVP game mode of multiplayer , racism, literal nazis, and man-babies. It’s really a shame that a game this well crafted and developed has to deal with this kind of stuff, and I hope in the future it’s handled.
